label: capability search • method • calendar scheduling recall
query: schedule a meeting with the design team tomorrow at 3pm
notes: Recall on a calendar intent with attendees + a relative time. `schedule` + `meeting` are the shared anchors with the seeded method; the distractors (summarize, currency) are unrelated, so the target should sit alone above the floor.

seedMethods.name: schedule_meeting
seedMethods.description: Schedule a calendar meeting with attendees at a specific date and time

seedMethods.name: summarize_document
seedMethods.description: Summarize a long document into key points
